text:
First, note time zones:  
US/Hawaii = UTC-10:30 (historical approximation for 1627, but we'll use modern offsets for this exercise).  
Asia/Riyadh = UTC+3 (no DST).  
Difference = 10.5 + 3 = 13.5 hours ahead for Riyadh.

7:00 + 13.5 hours = 20:30 same day.  
No date change because 7 + 13.5 = 20.5 (< 24).

FINAL_ANSWER: 1627-10-26 20:30
